description.line1: We are your trusted guide into the world of
description.line3: world of educational adventures with Silkway Global.

ielts.title: What is IELTS and why is it important?
ielts.description: IELTS — International English Language Testing System — is an exam that tests your English proficiency. It is essential for studying, working, or immigrating to English-speaking countries.

toefl-ets.title: TOEFL iBT by ETS
toefl-ets.description: Prepare for the TOEFL iBT exam with official materials from ETS. It’s a reliable way to practice and understand the test format.

khan-academy.title: Grammar with Khan Academy
khan-academy.description: Learn the basics of English grammar interactively. Free, fun, and effective!

toefl-test.title: TOEFL iBT Reading Practice
toefl-test.description: Try sample TOEFL reading tasks to boost your skills and get ready for the real test.

consult.title: Get a Consultation
consult.subtitle: Join thousands of successful students who got into their dream universities.

team.title: Silkway Global Team
team.subtitle: Our company is built on our teachers

testimonialsTitle: Your Journey to Studying Abroad Starts Here
testimonialsSubtitle: With our support, thousands of students have been accepted into universities abroad. You can too.
aboutUsTagline: Silkway Global is your trusted guide to the world of knowledge and experiences.
experience: For over 10 years, we have been organizing unforgettable vacations for children.
programs: Our programs combine learning, development, and safety.

1.text: We were looking for a course where our son would not only learn but also enjoy himself. In your lessons, he started speaking English with confidence and began watching movies without subtitles! Huge thanks to the teachers for their approach and support.
1.author: Serik Kabanbay

2.text: My son started learning English from scratch, and I see how quickly he is progressing.
2.author: Serik Kabanbay

3.text: Thank you for your attention to each student!
3.author: Saniya Abay

6.text: We were looking for a serious course for our son to prepare him for an international program. The teachers not only explain things clearly but also inspire him. Progress was noticeable in just three weeks.
6.author: Saniya Abay

7.text: The courses are modern, everything is explained simply, and most importantly — the teachers know how to engage the students. He is already speaking with confidence!
7.author: Saniya Abay

uk.text: Cambridge was an amazing experience. The program exceeded all my expectations!
uk.author: Anna S.

uk.text: The best language practice I've ever had. Top-notch teachers.
uk.author: Igor V.

uk.text: London is a fantastic city for students. Perfect balance of study and tours.
uk.author: Maria K.

uk.text: Total immersion helped me overcome my language barrier in just a month.
uk.author: Timur D.

uk.text: Excellent trip organization and very comfortable accommodation. Highly recommended!
uk.author: Sophia L.

malaysia.text: APU's technology left me speechless. The campus is straight out of the future!
malaysia.author: Ruslan M.

malaysia.text: Malaysia is a beautiful place to study. Very warm and friendly atmosphere.
malaysia.author: Alina T.

malaysia.text: Ideal conditions for IT students. Hands-on practice with advanced equipment.
malaysia.author: Denis P.

malaysia.text: A great opportunity to make friends from all over the world in a sunny country.
malaysia.author: Karina E.

malaysia.text: The program in Kuala Lumpur was the best decision for starting my career.
malaysia.author: Maxim I.

czechia.text: Prague is a fairytale! Studying at the language institute was incredibly useful.
czechia.author: Daria V.

czechia.text: Affordable and high-quality education right in the heart of Europe.
czechia.author: Artem S.

czechia.text: I really liked the mentors' approach. University preparation went smoothly.
czechia.author: Elena N.

czechia.text: An intensive program that genuinely prepares you for Czech universities.
czechia.author: Victor A.

czechia.text: New skills, friends, and tons of memories. I am absolutely thrilled!
czechia.author: Alisher O.
